title: sambucus pubens f. xanthocarpa
intro: Sambucus pubens f. xanthocarpa, also known as the yellow elderberry, is a variant of the American elderberry plant, characterized by its yellow or yellowish berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sambucus pubens f. xanthocarpa include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and syrups, and are often used to support respiratory health and combat viral infections.
